falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the pattern's implied bearish or sideways bias, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 14-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volume would suggest a major shift in market sentiment, directly contradicting the pattern's expectation of consolidation or continuation.
A blowoff score above 70 would indicate a confirmed blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the pattern's implied bottoming behavior and invalidating the HOLD verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
